## Current Feature Implementation Plan

**Feature**: Kids Daily Planner Dashboard (Feature Branch: `001-kids-daily-planner`)

For comprehensive implementation details, technical architecture, and design decisions, refer to:

- **Plan**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/plan.md](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/plan.md)
  - Technical context (TypeScript, Next.js 13+, React 18+, localStorage)
  - Constitution check and principles compliance
  - Project structure (app/, components/, lib/, styles/)

- **Research**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/research.md](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/research.md)
  - Tech stack decisions and justification (Next.js + React, TypeScript, Jest + RTL)
  - Architectural patterns (custom hooks, progressive enhancement, composition)
  - Best practices (performance, accessibility, code quality, security)

- **Data Model**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/data-model.md](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/data-model.md)
  - Entity definitions (TimeBlock, DailySchedule, DailyStars, Prize, WantList)
  - localStorage schema and persistence layer
  - State management hooks (useDailyData, useStarLogger, useWantList)
  - Computed values and error handling

- **Quickstart**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/quickstart.md](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/quickstart.md)
  - Setup (Node.js 18+, npm install)
  - Development workflow (npm run dev, npm test, npm run lint)
  - Build & deployment (npm run build, static export, CDN readiness)

- **Contracts**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/contracts/](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/contracts/)
  - Public API contracts (localStorage data format)
  - Static HTML export contract (CDN deployment)
  - Browser support, performance, accessibility, privacy contracts

- **Original Spec**: [specs/001-kids-daily-planner/spec.md](../specs/001-kids-daily-planner/spec.md)
  - Feature requirements and user stories (P1, P2 priorities)
  - Acceptance scenarios and testing

**Tech Stack Summary**: 
- Framework: Next.js 13+ with React 18+ and TypeScript
- Storage: localStorage for 100% client-side persistence
- Testing: Jest + React Testing Library
- Build: Static export via `next export` for CDN delivery
- Design: Mobile-first responsive, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility

**Key Shell Commands**:
```bash
npm run dev         # Start dev server (http://localhost:3000)
npm test            # Run Jest tests
npm run lint        # ESLint + Prettier
npm run build       # Build & export static site
npm run export      # Generate /out/ folder
```

**Project Structure** (Next.js App Router):
```
app/                # React components (page.tsx, layout.tsx)
components/         # Reusable components (DatePicker, TimeBlocks, StarsLogger, WantList)
lib/                # Business logic (hooks, storage, utils, types)
styles/             # CSS (globals, responsive, accessibility, variables)
__tests__/          # Jest tests (mirrors source structure)
out/                # Static export (generated by build)
```

<!-- SPECKIT END -->
